pageContext.name: Rei Ayanami
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse are excited to present the Rei Ayanami Collectible Figure!  The anime EVANGELION: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon a Time has finally arrived to the G.E.M.Series. Standing at over eight inches the figure features Eva Pilot Rei Ayanami.     Be sure to add this Collectible Figure to your Evangelion collection today!
